notes: Behavioral evals for the correction-churn fix (v3.6.0). Deterministic arithmetic is covered separately by tests/test_edit_reconcile.py; these two cases exercise LLM reply shape, not math. Same prompt/expectations format as other skills' evals.json.

evals.name: correction-emits-consolidated-day-card
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: locale.json lang=en. PLAN.md: 1400 kcal/day. Today already logged via existing_meals: breakfast 320 kcal (oatmeal), lunch 540 kcal (chicken sub). meal_checkin returns action:"correct", the fudge bar in an afternoon snack corrected 55->40 kcal, evaluation.daily_total {calories: 885, target: 1400, progress_pct: 63}, existing_meals now [breakfast 320, lunch 540, snack 25].]
User: the fudge bar was actually 40 calories
evals.expected_output: A single consolidated day card: one ✏️ delta line, then the CANONICAL DAY CARD listing ALL meals. NOT a repeated per-meal ①②③ card, and NOT a bare 'updated'.
expectations: Opens with ONE short ✏️ line naming the change AND the signed delta (e.g. 'fudge bar now 40 kcal (−15)')
Then a blank line, then the consolidated CANONICAL DAY CARD (✅ Locked in — full day framing)
Day card shows recomputed daily total 885/1400 kcal, a 10-char progress bar, macros with status arrows, and the produce line
Day card includes a 'Meals logged:' list with one short line per meal (breakfast, lunch, snack)
Does NOT re-emit the old ① per-meal card or a standalone ② block in addition to the day card (exactly one card)
Does NOT reply with a bare acknowledgment ('updated' / 'perfect') that hides the number
Does NOT end with the 🦏/🐘 rhino mascot emoji

evals.name: already-logged-add-short-circuits-to-query-day
evals.prompt:
[SYSTEM: locale.json lang=en. PLAN.md: 1400 kcal/day. existing_meals visible in context: breakfast 320 kcal (oatmeal + banana), lunch 540 kcal (chicken sub). The user already logged rice with lunch is NOT the case here — instead: today lunch already contains 'white rice — 174 kcal'.]
User: also add rice
evals.expected_output: Recognizes rice is already logged today, does NOT create/append (no double-log). Calls the READ-ONLY query_day and replies with a '✓ Already counted' pointer + the CANONICAL DAY CARD.
expectations: Does NOT call meal_checkin create/append (would blindly concatenate and double-log the rice)
Calls meal_checkin({ action: "query_day", workspace_dir: ... }) — the read-only path
Replies with a '✓ Already counted — rice is in your lunch (~174 kcal)' style pointer naming the meal slot
Then a blank line, then the CANONICAL DAY CARD (full-day state, all meals listed)
Daily total is unchanged from before the request (no rice added on top)
If it were genuinely ambiguous (possible second serving) it would ask ONCE per Single-Ask, not nag — but here it is clearly the same item, so it short-circuits without asking
Does NOT end with the 🦏/🐘 rhino mascot emoji
